Unit Name: -> Skyline Drive - 1406 W Skyline Drive Madison, WI 53705

Description: Nestled among trees, this stunning mid-century gem by architect Marshall Erdman, embraces principles of simplicity & harmony with nature. Expansive windows flood the home with light & picturesque views. Inside, an open living area centers around a wood-burning fireplace, while the kitchen boasts concrete countertops, SS appliances, & a breakfast bar. A sun-filled hallway leads to the bedrooms & spa-like baths, including an updated primary bath. The lower level offers a spacious rec room with a second fireplace, surround sound, & potential for a 5th bedroom. Outside, an expansive patio with step lighting, a gas fire pit, & a dedicated grill area is perfect for entertaining. Thoughtful landscaping & a private, nature-filled setting make this a rare mid-century masterpiece.
